name: eve
description: Durable backend agent on Vercel's eve — sessions, tools, skills, approvals, subagents, schedules, sandbox — behind the Labs chat surface.
postNotes: Next: bun install · `bun x eve link` pulls AI Gateway credentials into .env.local · `bun x eve dev` opens the agent TUI. The living eve reference is node_modules/eve/docs (versioned to the install) — read it before writing agent code.
